title: polystichum aculeatum var. semifertile
intro: Polystichum aculeatum var. semifertile, also known as the Half-Fertile Prickly Shield Fern, is a variety of the Prickly Shield Fern, a type of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Polystichum aculeatum var. semifertile include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used as a tea, tincture, or infused oil to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
